news.title: Debitam - Online Account Filing
news.summary:
Debitam, as a word in Latin, translates into English as “due”.
What we started as Online Account Filing 5 years ago, we rebranded ourselves as Debitam last year.
Being a unique and strongly tied term with the nature of our company filing service, we choose Debitam as our new name as a reminder of the fact that we will never let your company filings go overdue.
We pride ourselves with our meticulous tax filing reminding service and with protecting you from paying late filing penalties to Companies House and HMRC in the last 5 years, every day.
Meet the team, find out more about DEBITEM, give us a call, or just go on our website to read our blog.

The director of a company is responsible for running and carrying out the administration tasks of the company.
To be a director of the company, the following conditions need to be met: The person should be over 16 years of age Should not be disqualified to be a director Company Secretary A public limited company needs to appoint a company secretary while private companies have no such obligation by law.

news.title: SA1 Form Guide: Register for Self Assessment
news.summary:
This guide will walk you through everything you need to know about the SA1 form—who it’s for, why it matters, and how to complete it with ease.
The SA1 form is an official document from HMRC that allows you to register for Self Assessment if you're not automatically enrolled.
For more information about rental income property tax, read our blog Short Term Property Income Lettings.
To delve into a recently popular topic, foreign income and its tax implications, read SA106: Your Guide to Foreign Income Tax.
Once you've submitted your SA1 form, HMRC typically issues a response within 21 days, though this timeframe may be longer during peak periods.
